title: Interstate Transmission Acceleration Act
bill_text: A BILL To streamline federal permitting for interstate transmission lines, expand cost-sharing authority, and require DOE regional reliability planning reports every two years.
summary: This bill speeds up approval of interstate power lines, expands federal cost-sharing tools, and requires regular DOE reliability planning reports. It is focused on moving electricity across regions more efficiently and strengthening grid planning.

title: Maternal Telehealth Continuity Act
bill_text: A BILL To require Medicaid postpartum telehealth coverage for 12 months, create rural obstetrics support grants, and establish maternal mental health referral standards.
summary: This bill extends postpartum telehealth coverage in Medicaid for a full year, funds rural obstetrics support, and sets referral standards for maternal mental health care.

title: Federal Grants Integrity Dashboard Act
bill_text: A BILL To publish federal grant awards, sub-award recipients, and performance milestones in a machine-readable dashboard with quarterly updates.
summary: This bill creates a public, machine-readable dashboard of federal grant awards, sub-awards, and milestones, updated quarterly to improve transparency and oversight.

title: School Ventilation and Air Quality Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund HVAC modernization in K-12 schools, require indoor air quality monitoring in high-risk districts, and provide technical assistance for maintenance plans.
summary: This bill funds school HVAC upgrades, requires air quality monitoring in higher-risk districts, and provides technical help for long-term maintenance planning.

title: Rural EMS Stabilization Act
bill_text: A BILL To increase reimbursement for rural emergency transport, support volunteer EMT training stipends, and fund equipment replacement grants.
summary: This bill boosts support for rural emergency medical services through better transport reimbursement, training stipends for volunteer EMTs, and equipment replacement grants.

title: Clean Ports Infrastructure Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide grants for zero-emission cargo handling equipment, shore power installation, and freight corridor congestion mitigation.
summary: This bill funds cleaner port equipment, shore power for docked vessels, and freight congestion mitigation projects to reduce emissions and improve logistics efficiency.

title: Digital Procurement Records Act
bill_text: A BILL To require digital procurement records retention standards, vendor performance tagging, and searchable contract modification histories.
summary: This bill sets digital record standards for federal procurement, adds vendor performance tagging, and requires searchable histories of contract modifications.

title: Water Reuse Innovation Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund advanced wastewater recycling pilots, establish potable reuse safety guidance, and expand municipal technical assistance.
summary: This bill supports advanced wastewater recycling pilots, creates potable reuse safety guidance, and expands technical support for municipal water systems.

title: Workforce Childcare Access Act
bill_text: A BILL To provide tax credits for employers offering onsite childcare, fund childcare worker training pipelines, and support off-hour childcare pilots.
summary: This bill uses employer tax credits, training funding, and off-hour childcare pilots to expand childcare access for working families.

title: Public Transit State of Good Repair Act
bill_text: A BILL To increase formula grants for deferred transit maintenance, accessibility retrofits, and reliability-focused fleet replacement.
summary: This bill increases transit grants aimed at maintenance backlogs, accessibility upgrades, and replacing unreliable fleets to improve service dependability.

title: Cyber Incident Reporting Harmonization Act
bill_text: A BILL To align cyber incident reporting timelines across federal regulators and create a shared reporting portal for covered entities.
summary: This bill aligns cyber incident reporting deadlines across agencies and creates a shared portal so covered entities can file one coordinated report.

title: Community Heat Resilience Act
bill_text: A BILL To fund cooling centers, neighborhood shade projects, and local heat risk early warning systems in high-vulnerability communities.
summary: This bill funds local heat resilience infrastructure, including cooling centers, shade projects, and early warning systems for vulnerable communities.
